bias.description: does not build CDF packages, validation verdicts, receipts, checkpoints, or mirrors
generates TLC-shaped Arrow batches rather than reading source Parquet bytes
models a falsification candidate for destination-owned Arrow IPC handoff; no production adapter uses this path yet

reference.name: cdf-p3-lab+duckdb+nanoarrow
reference.semantic_work: materialize a persistent DuckDB table from uncompressed Arrow IPC handoff files via community nanoarrow read_arrow
